import sys, inspect
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')
from tsr.system import TSR
fn = TSR.render.__globals__['get_spherical_cameras']
with open('camera_helper_source.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('module=' + str(getattr(fn, '__module__', None)) + '\n')
    f.write(inspect.getsource(fn))
    f.write('\nGLOBALS\n')
    for name in ['get_ray_directions', 'get_rays', 'normalize', 'torch', 'F', 'np', 'Image']:
        obj = fn.__globals__.get(name, None)
        f.write(f'{name}: {obj} module={getattr(obj, "__module__", None)}\n')
print('wrote camera_helper_source.txt')
